full_text:
Xiang Kai (Gongju) 襄楷 (公矩)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Kai (襄楷), styledGongju (公矩), was born in Pingyuan. Widely read, he used portents against the eunuchs and for the reformers. Predicted the eunuchs’ destruction. Xiang Kai was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
